Loam Encrusted Robe  
 

Lore Item
Slot: CHEST
AC: 9
DEX: +10 INT: +5 AGI: +10 MANA: +80
SV MAGIC: +10
WT: 1.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Drops off progression?
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2011 at 1:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1676852262690
3 posts
I was wondering if anyone has seen this robe drop on progression servers yet (besides off Yael)? If so what mob did you get it from? Thanks
▲ Page top
robe was made for drakkin
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2007 at 2:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591832850662
18 posts
I like useing this robe to twink my lowbie research chars for the mana - 80 mana at lv 1 is nice, always dyed it as it looked tacky - the colour is not pretty at all - but after I made a drakkin necro and saw the graphic i fell in love!!!!! The Drakkin was made to wear this robe!!!! The best look i have seen on a caster yet!! now i dont care about the mana as my toon looks great in it!! I didnt even have to dye it - im happy with it as is :-)
▲ Page top
yup
QuoteReply
# Dec 09 2005 at 8:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592769073085
6 posts
I picked one up at bazaar for 2.5k =\. It was 5k but they loweredit for me lol didnt find out till after i got it that it dropped in the hole and ive ben fighting there the past week lol could have got one free!

QuoteReply
# Aug 05 2005 at 7:42 PM Rating: Decent

1 post
Picked this baby up for 100pp on Maelin. Totally got lucky there.
▲ Page top
price
QuoteReply
# May 05 2005 at 5:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592761097813
48 posts
found one in bazaar for 350pp....think he forgot the extra 0 but hey...i like da robe:)
▲ Page top
Dropped today
QuoteReply
# Sep 12 2003 at 9:22 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591787680347
28 posts
I was down in the hole soloing today. 55th lvl shaman here. Once i made my way past the entrance with the 6 elementals, the one roamer ,and then the 2 by the doorway after going down the stairs and hanging a right. I decided not to go back to the front and med till respawn. Why not work my way on down. So I went up into the tower and begin working my way on down. There were several elemental of this and that. I fought an elemental crusader and it dropped a Loam encrusted cap. Later on a Loam encrusted sash dropped off of a Warrior. Then Later on Loam encrusted robe dropped off a warrior. I think they have increased the drop rate on these items. I never got drops like this before off of the old warriors. Have it in the bazaar for 4k now. Since I had to go to work tonight. Mobs were light blue, but doing 100% aa it was okay. I might be there more often. 4k in couple hours of soloing is not bad. Just my opinion though.
▲ Page top
Terrible robe
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 9:09 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591776191924
Scholar
150 posts
At 65 and 200+ int, Loam is only 112.5 mana.

By the time you have access to this robe, you also have access to much better.
▲ Page top
RE: Terrible robe
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2004 at 12:56 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1626049033848
Scholar
346 posts
Yes, at level 65 this robe would not be all that great. Especially since you can get...

http://www.allakhazam.com/db/item.html?item=24396
Immortal's bloodied robe for 1492 points in BB LDoN. And there are many other better robes, depending on how and where you play.

However, this robe has NO level restriction. Your level 1 int caster can wear this. Not only that, but most int caster items have, not too surprisingly, + int . So, a lot of us have our int maxed. This robe has good mana and dex.

I agree with you, that at lvl 65 its not very good, but its actually pretty good for a low-mid level toon.

As far as access goes, see them in the bazaar for under 4k pp all the time.

▲ Page top
yeah 17K lmao
QuoteReply

__DEL__1591784304171
7 posts
man!they sure dont rate items on cost based on averages on Torv. must be to uber a server =P

# Jun 16 2003 at 6:36 PM Rating: Default

You aren't kidding either...wish I could get 17k for mine =X

Salkan - 54th Druid of Tunare

Torvo
▲ Page top
One of the nicest
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2002 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362113895
Scholar
25 posts
Without a doubt this is one of the best robes going. I like to compare it to a dreamweaver robe that has i believe sta12 int14 mana40 and a few array of resists. However, the Loam robe in my opinion is far nicer. 80mana is equivalent to about 17 or 18 int, combine that with the 5 int it comes with and you have a nice 22 int robe. Dreamweaver robe is equivalent to about 23 or 24 int robe but its gawd awful yellow and no drop. There are usually less than 5 Loam robes on each server due to their rareness, which in my opinion, makes them even more coveted and valuable. The robe looks "prestigious" when worn and i was lucky enough to come across a level 59 chanter that sold it to me for 6k, far less than its worth. He needed the money to buy KEI. And when a better robe becomes available i can resell this one because wonderfully it is not no drop.

Edited, Sat Oct 19 16:32:50 2002
▲ Page top
Price
QuoteReply
# Apr 26 2002 at 11:39 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591773299420
26 posts
The stats are nice, but not that nice. I think a lot of the price is the look and the rarity. I'd buy one for 1k, but no more
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2002 at 7:24 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251707392
19 posts
ya ya ya buddy, cant say much but u must be a wisdom char player to say robe is only worth 1k, nough said.
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# May 13 2002 at 2:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
If you find one for 1k, more power to ya! Never going to, though. Even with the mana changes post 200 int now, the 80 mana with that 5 int makes it more like an 18 int robe and that's at level 60. 21 int robe at level 50, etc, etc. Plus, finding saves on a robe without downgradeing to a SMR or froglok's robe will put you in ToV type stuff wich not every Joe Blow on the street can obtain. It's getting easier but not THAT easy. Coupled with the fact that you're lucky if this guy is killed more than once or twice inbetween patches because of his insane spawn time and that this isn't a super common drop.... that makes this robe very rare and fairly expensive.

You're really not going to find a robe that's arguably better than almost all PoH and PoF robes, and is much more rare, for 1k.
▲ Page top
I had one
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 4:44 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779797344
129 posts
These are excellent... They are very rare to get. At level 60 this is the equivilant of a 19 int robe(14int = 81 mana in the 200+ range). The Skyshrine robe quests are certainly better.

This robe gives 109 mana... The insidious robe gives 110 for enchanters at level 60. It is almost as good as planar robes. Yoou will see roughly 2-3 loam pieces per level you spend in the hole. Some are rarer that others; amices and chokers drop more than the other pieces. You can consider that you have about a 5% chance of seeing a robe per level you spend in the hole xping.
▲ Page top
RE: I had one
QuoteReply
# Sep 03 2002 at 1:18 PM Rating: Default

330 posts

30 posts
Not sure how great this robe is now that the Int Cap has been raised all the way up to 255. ;/
▲ Page top
RE: Int Cap Increase
QuoteReply
# Feb 15 2002 at 6:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762681291
91 posts
I would say so, because according to what I have heard and seen, it is about 5 mana per int after 200 now at lvl 50, meaning that mana per int would be 1/10 of level aprox, as it is 1/5 of level for pre200. So this robe is equivocally 21 int, if you think of it post 200.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 08 2001 at 3:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Buying this, Loam Encrusted Sleeves, and Bracer on Mithaniel Marr server. Might be intrested in other Loam pieces too, send a tell to Fauzen or Tordek.
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 18 2001 at 4:33 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i got one of these for sale on the E'ci server if anyone is interested me a tell
Doesn't look like FBR at all
QuoteReply
# Jul 20 2001 at 5:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965792734
105 posts
Ok we all agree that the stats are nice ok? 80 mana and the MR is what catches my eye.. very nice.

On the looks: first time I saw one was when I was a noob and even then I thought 'whoa what is this godly robe?' I saw at once that it wasn't the FBR and like I said I was a noob. lvl 4 or so with my first char ever. All I can say is... I have seen that robe only once after that and that's half a year ago .. hum. I want this robe, would go well with my collection. And yes, I do wear robes anly for looks :P Robes I use are Tattered Tomb Shroud, Robe of Dalnir and also the TeirDal Tunic. I just love em too much. *rambles on about his clothes, getting a tear in his eye then shuts up*

Vermis Mysteriis
52 necro of Torv
▲ Page top
RE: Doesn't look like FBR at all
QuoteReply
# May 10 2002 at 9:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591774423464
12 posts
i buy robes because of the looks to lol, when you can get 9 int out of a bracer, looseing one or two int from the better robes dosent even matter, and the saves and mana are real nice, i think ill buy one

Robe rocks
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2001 at 1:57 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I managed to get one of these on rodcet nife. The stats on this rock. You can be told it looks like FBR but it really doesn't. Robe is very rare and isnt often seen with.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 07 2001 at 9:33 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) how much is it worth
Look of this robe
QuoteReply
# Apr 02 2001 at 6:05 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247003029
2 posts
This robe looks damn cool - right, its the style of the good ol´ FBR, but the people that say it looks boring havent seen one themselves, I guess.
It has a brown (loam encrusted *hint*) graffiti-like shading and looks extremely cool.
According to the stats: they are excellent! You have to see that this precious here drops off Master Yael, a 52plus creature. If you are able to kill it with your group/guild/whatever you are above lvl 50, too - you should have an intelligence rating of 200+ already (if not = poor you). The Mana boost of 80 is incredible and just a few robes have an equal mana boost (and thats waht you need if your Int is 200+); the attribute increase (Dex 10, Agi 10, Int 5) and not to forget the SV Magic rating are very good indeed. Given the chance to choose between the Froglok BC Robe (even if I wouldnt own it) and the Loam Encr. Robe - Loam Encrusted would be my choice.
Just my 2cp

Ryanzbane Darkmesh
"Testament of Valor"
Lvl 54 Necromancer of Xegony

▲ Page top
RE: Look of this robe
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 3:10 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760312326
15 posts
i agree 100% it looks very unique in its own way but also looks like a fbr in some ways. You can see what this robe looks like under the Equipment tab in Fashion Tables. Id definatly want this even without the stats to me the stats are just an added bonus on its great looks =)
▲ Page top
not that weak
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2001 at 11:27 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this is a great robe for post 50 chars that are 200int + . unlike most castor item where int is the the main reason to wear a robe, this is for the mana. seeing that post 50 int really doesn't mean much with the soft cap. my personal veiw is post 200int 5 int extra is 5 mana then add +80 mana as a bonus , great for extending you mana pool,if you're not planes ready P . it basicly breaks down like this with mana + int this robe is equal to abput a 13 int robe and yes what an ugly robe it is ( my 2 cp . neecro pheelyack - 53 heretic<sol invictus> tribunial
▲ Page top
Weak? Hardly.
QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2001 at 1:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591750508920
View User Forum
8 posts
Realize that a wizard at 45 gets between 8-12 mana points per INT point.

Realize that above 200, INT adds to the mana pool at a 1:1 ratio.

Realize that +Mana items will ALWAYS add to mana pool.

Therefore, this robe has the benefit of +13 INT (using the conservative 8:1 ratio) without running into the 200 cap.

And don't forget the +10 DEX, AGI, and SV MAGIC.

Looks aside, this robe is worthy of the pursuit.
▲ Page top
RE: Weak? Hardly.
QuoteReply
# May 13 2002 at 2:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591760131119
View User Forum
330 posts
Not so, anymore. :)

Mana post 200 is exactly half per point of what it would be pre 200. This is still a very fine robe. Just not QUITE as much so.

#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 15 2001 at 4:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Looks like a FBR. Saw a 57 necro in one and I laughed, then he said "*sigh*.. Inspect first then laugh..
